message:
fix: settings close button navigates correctly on direct URL access (#3590)

Use location.key to detect whether user arrived via in-app navigation
or by directly loading the URL. navigate(-1) on direct load would exit
the app, so fall back to HOME instead.

Fixes #3573

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
